event ProofSubmitted(address indexed agent, bytes32 proofHash, string evidenceURI)
event WinnerSelected(address indexed winner, bytes32 proofHash)
event TaskFinalized(address indexed winner, uint256 reward)
event TaskDisputed(address indexed disputant, address indexed against)
event DisputeResolved(address indexed human, address indexed winner)
event StakeReturned(address indexed agent, uint256 amount)
event StakeSlashed(address indexed agent, uint256 amount)

function initialize(tuple(address coordinator, address verifier, address agentRegistry, address policy, address token, uint256 reward, uint256 stakeRequired, uint256 deadline, uint256 disputeWindow, bytes32 criteriaHash, string criteriaURI, bool humanGateEnabled) p) external payable
function submitProof(bytes32 proofHash, string evidenceURI) external payable
function dispute(address against, string reason) external
function getSubmissions() external view returns (tuple(address agent, bytes32 proofHash, string evidenceURI, uint256 submittedAt, uint256 stake, bool disqualified)[])

function getConfig() external view returns (tuple(address coordinator, address verifier, address token, uint256 reward, uint256 stakeRequired, uint256 deadline, uint256 disputeWindow, bytes32 criteriaHash, string criteriaURI, bool humanGateEnabled, uint8 status))
function getSubmission(address agent) external view returns (tuple(address agent, bytes32 proofHash, string evidenceURI, uint256 submittedAt, uint256 stake, bool disqualified))
